value.rationale: The page is entirely about the Antigravity CLI's fine-grained permissions engine — covering allow/deny/ask policies, supported actions (read_file, write_file, read_url, execute_url, command, unsandboxed, mcp), interactive TUI prompts, and configuration examples. There is no mention anywhere of a "Remote control" feature (mobile or web) that would allow steering or approving agent runs from a phone or remote client. The interactive approval mechanism described is local TUI-based, not remote/mobile.
